programmes.show_description: The Death Cleaners vs. The Sister Council: Flora and Jeff are finally empty-nesters after raising eight kids, and they are ready to death clean - but their kids are against it.
Katherine Ryan: Louis meets the comedian, actor and writer, Katherine Ryan, for a frank and honest conversation about her career, relationships and the changing shape of her family.
Jo and Ash deal with a patient whose chronic cough leaves him struggling to breathe, while Joel and Nic treat a man who's fallen from a ladder while wielding a hedge trimmer.
Shopping from Home.
Theo and the Suitcase Pups: Pete returns to Dogs Trust, facing a suitcase of abandoned pups on day one and falling hard for Theo, a gentle Italian Mastiff with a serious heart condition.

The work of NHS emergency response teams. Staff are scrambled to a block of flats after an explosion causes multiple casualties and a driver is trapped after his lorry hits a tree.
Soon after Derrick Todd Lee was captured, new murders occurred. Tyre-track evidence led to Sean Vincent Gillis, whose 2004 arrest revealed he was responsible for several brutal killings.
A DNA sample from Sean Vincent Gillis linked him to multiple murders. Together, Gillis and Derrick Todd Lee killed 20 women, and dozens of cases in Baton Rouge still remain unsolved.
Detectives in Sydney investigate the case of a young woman who has vanished in mysterious circumstances, while in Melbourne, police race to find a man missing during a storm.
Police launch two large-scale searches to find a father-of-two who goes missing off the WA coast and a navy veteran lost in hazardous bushland.

programmes.show_name: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programmes.show_description: The Wurst of Times: Doug's fiancee won't move in until he clears his tiki collection and his ex-wife's stuff, so the Death Cleaners help him clean the clutter in his heart and home. S1 Ep
Rita Ora: Louis meets Rita Ora at her dad's pub in West London to discuss her rise to stardom, her family's arrival in the UK in 1990, and her difficulties dealing with press scrutiny.
Today in Stoke, newly-wed paramedics Mick and Rachel help a young man who has hurt his back. In Dudley, paramedics help a 74-year-old who had a shock from his internal defibrillator.
Shopping from Home.

Terri, Esme and the Chi Family: Pete meets Lurcher Terri, who's terrified of the world and must learn to trust again, and helps settle a family of chihuahuas given up by their heartbroken owner. S2 Ep

The team joins the search for a missing aeroplane pilot and passenger. A man digging for antique bottles in a South Yorkshire tip is buried alive, leading to a desperate fight to save him.
New. When the body of a scientist is found in Loch Katrine, Annika is reminded of Ibsen's Enemy of the People.
New. The team are called in when writer Cara Gibson is found dead under a bridge.
Fascinating documentary exploring a secretive character known by the pseudonym, Satoshi Nakamoto, who launched the world's greatest monetary invention - and then disappeared.
